props.className: {{_local.statusFilter === '' ? 'badge-status cursor-pointer bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 ring-1 ring-gray-400 dark:bg-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300' : 'badge-status cursor-pointer bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-150 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:bg-gray-750'}}

{{_local.statusFilter === 'completed' ? 'badge-status badge-status-success cursor-pointer ring-1 ring-green-400' : 'badge-status cursor-pointer bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-150 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:bg-gray-750'}}

{{_local.statusFilter === 'processing' ? 'badge-status badge-status-processing cursor-pointer ring-1 ring-blue-400' : 'badge-status cursor-pointer bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-150 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:bg-gray-750'}}

{{_local.statusFilter === 'failed' ? 'badge-status badge-status-error cursor-pointer ring-1 ring-red-400' : 'badge-status cursor-pointer bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-150 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:bg-gray-750'}}

{{_local.statusFilter === 'expired' ? 'badge-status badge-status-expired cursor-pointer ring-1 ring-gray-400' : 'badge-status cursor-pointer bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-150 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:bg-gray-750'}}

children.comment: 부모(date_filter_row)는 flex-wrap 이지만 이 행 자신은 nowrap 이라, 시작일~종료일(각 input w-36 = 144px)이 좁은 뷰포트에서 콘텐츠 영역을 11px 넘긴다. 자식에도 flex-wrap 을 준다.
